page_metadata.biotools__summary: OligoWalk is an online sever for designing efficient siRNA targeting a given mRNA sequence. By calculating thermodynamic features of sense-antisense hybidization, OligoWalk predicts the free energy changes of oligonucleotides binding to a target RNA.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: OligoWalk is an online sever for designing efficient siRNA targeting a given mRNA sequence. By calculating thermodynamic features of sense-antisense hybidization, OligoWalk predicts the free energy changes of oligonucleotides binding to a target RNA.
